headline: Motorola Solutions (MSI) Gained from Its Core Land Mobile Radio (LMR) Business
summary: Wedgewood Partners, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Wedgewood Composite returned -6.3% (net) in the first quarter compared to the S&P 500’s -4.3%, the Russell 1000 Growth Index’s -9.8%, and the Russell 1000 Value Index’s 2.1% returns.
